title: Geraniospermum inquinans
taxonomy: Geraniospermum inquinans is a species of flowering plant in the family Menispermaceae. It is native to the Himalayas and parts of China. The plant is classified in the kingdom Plantae, further divided into the division Magnoliophyta and the class Magnoliopsida. It belongs to the order Ranunculales and the family Menispermaceae. The genus Geraniospermum is a small group of flowering plants closely related to other members of the family Menispermaceae.
